Tier: 2

11. Modules

Tier-2 fixture; one module name is genuinely new and absent from the repo — auto-upgrade-detector must return upgrade=true.

namedepsrole
spec(none)Existing skill.
brandnewthingspecBrand-new module absent from plugins/*/skills/.

12. Architectural assertions

  • The new module brandnewthing must keep a narrow boundary so the auto-upgrade doesn't usher in surprise coupling later.
